contentBlocks.original:
मनोबुद्ध्यहङ्कार चित्तानि नाहं
न च श्रोत्रजिह्वे न च घ्राणनेत्रे ।
न च व्योम भूमिर्न तेजो न वायुः
चिदानन्दरूपः शिवोऽहम् शिवोऽहम् ॥१॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
manobuddhyahaṅkāra cittāni nāhaṃ
na ca śrotrajihve na ca ghrāṇanetre .
na ca vyoma bhūmirna tejo na vāyuḥ
cidānandarūpaḥ śivo'ham śivo'ham ||1||
contentBlocks.translation:
Neither am I the mind nor intelligence or ego,
Neither am I the organs of hearing (ears), nor that of tasting (tongue), smelling (nose) or seeing (eyes),
Neither am I the sky, nor the earth, neither the fire nor the air,
I am Shiva, the supreme auspiciousness of the nature of consciousness-bliss.
I am (Shiva) the auspiciousness.
contentBlocks.meanings: मनोबुद्ध्यहङ्कार (manobuddhyahaṅkāra) – mind, intellect, ego (manas:mind | buddhi:intellect | ahaṅkāra:ego); चित्तानि (cittāni) – consciousness; नाहं (nāhaṃ) – I am not; न (na) – neither; च (ca) – and; श्रोत्रजिह्वे (śrotrajihve) – ears and tongue (śrotra:ears | jihvā:tongue); न (na) – neither; च (ca) – and; घ्राणनेत्रे (ghrāṇanetre) – nose and eyes (ghrāṇa:nose | netra:eyes); न (na) – neither; च (ca) – and; व्योम (vyoma) – sky; भूमिर्न (bhūmirna) – nor earth (bhūmi:earth | na:nor); तेजो (tejo) – fire; न (na) – nor; वायुः (vāyuḥ) – air; चिदानन्दरूपः (cidānandarūpaḥ) – nature of consciousness-bliss (cit:consciousness | ānanda:bliss | rūpaḥ:nature); शिवोऽहम् (śivo'ham) – I am Shiva (śivaḥ:Shiva | aham:I am); शिवोऽहम् (śivo'ham) – I am Shiva (śivaḥ:Shiva | aham:I am);

contentBlocks.original:
न च प्राणसंज्ञो न वै पञ्चवायुः
न वा सप्तधातुः न वा पञ्चकोशः ।
न वाक्पाणिपादं न चोपस्थपायु
चिदानन्दरूपः शिवोऽहम् शिवोऽहम् ॥२॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
na ca prāṇasaṃjño na vai pañcavāyuḥ
na vā saptadhātuḥ na vā pañcakośaḥ .
na vākpāṇipādaṃ na copasthapāyu
cidānandarūpaḥ śivo'ham śivo'ham ||2||
contentBlocks.translation:
Neither am I the vital breath, nor the five vital air,
Neither am I the seven ingredients (of the body), nor the five sheaths (of the body),
Neither am I the organ of speech, nor the organs for holding (hand), movement (feet) or excretion,
Iam the ever pure blissful consciousness; I am Shiva, I am Shiva,
The ever pure blissful consciousness.
contentBlocks.meanings: न (na) – neither; च (ca) – and; प्राणसंज्ञः (prāṇasaṃjñaḥ) – vital breath (prāṇa:breath | saṃjñaḥ:known as); न (na) – nor; वै (vai) – indeed; पञ्चवायुः (pañcavāyuḥ) – five vital airs (pañca:five | vāyuḥ:airs); न (na) – nor; वा (vā) – or; सप्तधातुः (saptadhātuḥ) – seven ingredients (sapta:seven | dhātuḥ:ingredients); न (na) – nor; वा (vā) – or; पञ्चकोशः (pañcakośaḥ) – five sheaths (pañca:five | kośaḥ:sheaths); न (na) – nor; वाक्पाणिपादं (vākpāṇipādam) – speech, hands, feet (vāk:speech | pāṇi:hands | pādam:feet); न (na) – nor; च (ca) – and; उपस्थपायु (upasthapāyu) – organs of excretion (upastha:organ of generation | pāyu:organ of excretion); चिदानन्दरूपः (cidānandarūpaḥ) – form of blissful consciousness (cit:consciousness | ānanda:bliss | rūpaḥ:form); शिवः (śivaḥ) – Shiva; अहम् (aham) – I am; शिवः (śivaḥ) – Shiva; अहम् (aham) – I am;

contentBlocks.original:
न मे द्वेषरागौ न मे लोभमोहौ
मदो नैव मे नैव मात्सर्यभावः ।
न धर्मो न चार्थो न कामो न मोक्षः
चिदानन्दरूपः शिवोऽहम् शिवोऽहम् ॥३॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
na me dveṣarāgau na me lobhamohau
mado naiva me naiva mātsaryabhāvaḥ .
na dharmo na cārtho na kāmo na mokṣaḥ
cidānandarūpaḥ śivo'ham śivo'ham ||3||
contentBlocks.translation:
Neither do I have hatred, nor attachment, neither greed nor infatuation,
Neither do I have passion, nor feelings of envy and jealousy,
I am not within the bounds of dharma (righteousness), artha (wealth), kama (desire) and moksha (liberation) (the four purusarthas of life),
I am Shiva, the supreme auspiciousness of the nature of consciousness-bliss.
I am (Shiva) the auspiciousness.
contentBlocks.meanings: न (na) – not; मे (me) – my; द्वेषरागौ (dveṣarāgau) – hatred and attachment (dveṣa:hatred | rāgau:attachment); न (na) – not; मे (me) – my; लोभमोहौ (lobhamohau) – greed and infatuation (lobha:greed | mohau:infatuation); मदः (madaḥ) – pride; नैव (naiva) – neither; मे (me) – my; नैव (naiva) – nor; मात्सर्यभावः (mātsaryabhāvaḥ) – feelings of envy (mātsarya:envy | bhāvaḥ:feelings); न (na) – not; धर्मः (dharmaḥ) – righteousness; न (na) – not; च (ca) – and; अर्थः (arthaḥ) – wealth; न (na) – not; कामः (kāmaḥ) – desire; न (na) – not; मोक्षः (mokṣaḥ) – liberation; चित् (cit) – consciousness; आनन्दरूपः (ānandarūpaḥ) – of the nature of bliss (ānanda:bliss | rūpaḥ:nature of); शिवः (śivaḥ) – Shiva; अहम् (aham) – I am; शिवः (śivaḥ) – Shiva; अहम् (aham) – I am;

contentBlocks.original:
न पुण्यं न पापं न सौख्यं न दुःखं
न मन्त्रो न तीर्थं न वेदा न यज्ञाः ।
अहं भोजनं नैव भोज्यं न भोक्ता
चिदानन्दरूपः शिवोऽहम् शिवोऽहम् ॥४॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
na puṇyaṃ na pāpaṃ na saukhyaṃ na duḥkhaṃ
na mantro na tīrthaṃ na vedā na yajñāḥ .
ahaṃ bhojanaṃ naiva bhojyaṃ na bhoktā
cidānandarūpaḥ śivo'ham śivo'ham ||4||
contentBlocks.translation:
Neither am I bound by merits nor sins, neither by worldly joys nor by sorrows,
Neither am I bound by sacred hymns nor by sacred places, neither by sacred scriptures nor by sacrifies,
I am neither enjoyment (experience), nor an object to be enjoyed (experienced), nor the enjoyer (experiencer),
I am Shiva, the supreme auspiciousness of the nature of consciousness-bliss.
I am (Shiva) the auspiciousness.
contentBlocks.meanings: न (na) – not; पुण्यं (puṇyaṃ) – merit; न (na) – not; पापं (pāpaṃ) – sin; न (na) – not; सौख्यं (saukhyam) – worldly joy; न (na) – not; दुःखं (duḥkham) – sorrow; न (na) – not; मन्त्रः (mantraḥ) – sacred hymn; न (na) – not; तीर्थं (tīrtham) – sacred place; न (na) – not; वेदाः (vedāḥ) – sacred scriptures; न (na) – not; यज्ञाः (yajñāḥ) – sacrifices; अहं (ahaṃ) – I am; भोजनं (bhojanam) – enjoyment; नैव (naiva) – neither; भोज्यं (bhojyam) – object to be enjoyed; न (na) – not; भोक्ता (bhoktā) – enjoyer; चिदानन्दरूपः (cidānandarūpaḥ) – of the nature of consciousness-bliss (cit:consciousness | ānanda:bliss | rūpaḥ:nature of); शिवः (śivaḥ) – Shiva; अहम् (aham) – I am; शिवः (śivaḥ) – Shiva; अहम् (aham) – I am;

contentBlocks.original:
न मृत्युर्न शङ्का न मे जातिभेदः
पिता नैव मे नैव माता न जन्मः ।
न बन्धुर्न मित्रं गुरुर्नैव शिष्यं
चिदानन्दरूपः शिवोऽहम् शिवोऽहम् ॥५॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
na mṛtyurna śaṅkā na me jātibhedaḥ
pitā naiva me naiva mātā na janmaḥ .
na bandhurna mitraṃ gururnaiva śiṣyaṃ
cidānandarūpaḥ śivo'ham śivo'ham ||5||
contentBlocks.translation:
Neither am I bound by death and its fear, nor by the rules of caste and its distinctions,
Neither do I have father and mother, nor do I have birth,
Neither do I have relations nor friends, neither spiritual teacher nor disciple,
I am Shiva, the supreme auspiciousness of the nature of consciousness-bliss.
I am (Shiva) the auspiciousness.
contentBlocks.meanings: न (na) – neither; मृत्युः (mṛtyuḥ) – death; न (na) – nor; शङ्का (śaṅkā) – fear; न (na) – nor; मे (me) – my; जातिभेदः (jātibhedaḥ) – caste distinctions (jāti:caste | bhedaḥ:distinctions); पिता (pitā) – father; नैव (naiva) – nor indeed; मे (me) – my; नैव (naiva) – nor indeed; माता (mātā) – mother; न (na) – nor; जन्मः (janmaḥ) – birth; न (na) – nor; बन्धुः (bandhuḥ) – relation; न (na) – nor; मित्रं (mitraṃ) – friend; गुरुः (guruḥ) – spiritual teacher; नैव (naiva) – nor indeed; शिष्यं (śiṣyaṃ) – disciple; चिदानन्दरूपः (cidānandarūpaḥ) – of the nature of consciousness-bliss (cit:consciousness | ānanda:bliss | rūpaḥ:nature); शिवः (śivaḥ) – Shiva; अहम् (aham) – I am; शिवः (śivaḥ) – Shiva; अहम् (aham) – I am;

contentBlocks.original:
अहं निर्विकल्पो निराकाररूपो
विभुत्वाच्च सर्वत्र सर्वेन्द्रियाणाम् ।
न चासङ्गतं नैव मुक्तिर्न मेयः
चिदानन्दरूपः शिवोऽहम् शिवोऽहम् ॥६॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
ahaṃ nirvikalpo nirākārarūpo
vibhutvācca sarvatra sarvendriyāṇām .
na cāsaṅgataṃ naiva muktirna meyaḥ
cidānandarūpaḥ śivo'ham śivo'ham ||6||
contentBlocks.translation:
I am without any variation, and without any form,
I am present everywhere as the underlying substratum of everything, and behind all sense organs,
Neither do I get attached to anything, nor get freed from anything,
I am Shiva, the supreme auspiciousness of the nature of consciousness-bliss.
I am (Shiva) the auspiciousness.
contentBlocks.meanings: अहं (ahaṃ) – I am; निर्विकल्पः (nirvikalpaḥ) – without variation; निराकाररूपः (nirākārarūpaḥ) – formless (nirākāra:formless | rūpaḥ:form); विभुत्वात् (vibhutvāt) – due to pervasiveness; च (ca) – and; सर्वत्र (sarvatra) – everywhere; सर्वेन्द्रियाणाम् (sarvendriyāṇām) – of all sense organs (sarva:all | indriyāṇām:of sense organs); न (na) – not; च (ca) – and; असङ्गतम् (asaṅgatam) – unattached; नैव (naiva) – nor; मुक्तिः (muktiḥ) – liberation; न (na) – not; मेयः (meyaḥ) – measurable; चिदानन्दरूपः (cidānandarūpaḥ) – of the nature of consciousness-bliss (cit:consciousness | ānanda:bliss | rūpaḥ:nature); शिवः (śivaḥ) – Shiva; अहम् (aham) – I am; शिवः (śivaḥ) – Shiva; अहम् (aham) – I am;
